title: stelis protuberans
intro: Stelis protuberans, also known as the Stelis orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis protuberans include its potential to alleviate fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Stelis protuberans is typically consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice, allowing for its medicinal properties to be absorbed and utilized by the body.
